title: Sweet Rosie O'Grady
actors: Shirley Mason, Cullen Landis, E. Alyn Warren
plot: A baby girl is left at the door of Brady, an Irish-policeman in New York City. He and his friends bid for her, and she is won by Uncle Ben Shapiro, a pawnbroker, who raises her to young womanhood, and is known as Sweet Rosie O'Gra...
